content.en:
"What, don't you want to be my disciple?"

The Ice Palace Lord asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian immediately said.

This is a good opportunity, if you become a disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace Master, then you will have more opportunities to get more resources in the future, and you can even easily access the treasures that contain the ultimate extreme path!

And the Ice Palace Lord couldn't recognize his identity, so he didn't worry about being exposed.

"Great!"

The Ice Palace Lord was very happy.

Soon, Ye Tian was taken to the Ice and Snow Palace by the Ice and Snow Palace Master.

"Golden Wing, you are my thirteenth disciple, there are only three disciples in the Ice and Snow Palace at the moment, I will let them come and get to know you!" said the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace.

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tianying said.

Soon, Ye Tian met the other three disciples of the Ice and Snow Palace Master.

When he saw one of the disciples, Ye Tian was shocked.

"It's her!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is an ice phoenix, it is the daughter of the lord of the ice phoenix, or did he save the daughter of the lord of the ice phoenix, but he didn't expect to become a disciple of the lord of the ice and snow palace, this luck is too good!

Now, the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix is named Bingli, and she has also cultivated to the realm of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, although she is not a pure-blooded Extreme Dao creature, but her bloodline is not weak, coupled with the resource supply of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord, the cultivation speed is naturally not bad.

The other two are the realm of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm, and they are not very far from the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm.

However, it is not very difficult for an Extreme Dao creature to become a Perfect Controller of the True Realm, but it is extremely difficult to become a Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm, even if it is a disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord, it is very difficult to break this shackle.

I don't know how many True Realm Perfect Controllers there are in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, there are too many of them, but the Extreme Dao creatures that have become Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are very rare, and the breakthrough ratio is too low.

Comparatively speaking, the proportion of breakthroughs at the end of the world is much higher.

After Ye Tian got to know several disciples of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord, he was arranged by the Ice and Snow Palace Lord to a side hall of the Ice and Snow Palace, which would become a place for him to practice in the future.

Subsequently, the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace gave him a lot of cultivation resources, and many of the treasures of the Ice and Snow Palace were also open to him.

"There are actually thirty-six Extreme Dao Monuments in the Ice and Snow Palace!!!"

After Ye Tian found out, he was shocked.

You must know that the Extreme Dao True River at the end of the world, at the beginning, you could only take out more than a dozen Extreme Dao Monuments in one go, so that people can choose to participate in enlightenment!

Compared with the Ice and Snow Palace, the Extreme Dao True River is very barren!

However, the Ice and Snow Palace Lord did not give him the treasure containing the Extreme Extreme, which was also very normal.

After all, for the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, the value of the treasure containing the Extreme Extreme Dao is also very high, how can it be given to a disciple!

However, seeing these thirty-six Extreme Dao Monuments is also a huge gain for Ye Tian!

He can copy these thirty-six Extreme Dao Monuments one by one, although he can only copy one at a time, and he must be lifted before he can copy the other Extreme Dao Monuments.

But at the very least, the Extreme Dao corresponding to these thirty-six Extreme Dao Monuments, Ye Tian can use these Extreme Dao Monuments to comprehend and cultivate to the consummation realm.

Of course, for Ye Tian, the biggest gain is the identity of the main disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace, which is enough for him to do a lot of things.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to send the resources of the Ice and Snow Palace to Ye Tian's other copy bodies to improve the cultivation of other copy bodies.

And all this, the Ice and Snow Palace Lord did not find out.

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord also occasionally instructed him to practice, but it didn't help Ye Tian much, but Ye Tian also pretended to benefit a lot.

Time flies.

After Ye Tian became a disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace, he gradually made a name for himself in the Extreme Deep Sea, and he also had many achievements, and the name of a peerless genius resounded throughout the Extreme Deep Sea.

Moreover, Ye Tian has broken through many treasure lands, obtained a large amount of resources, and relied on his identity, even if he obtained great benefits, those big people did not dare to make a move on him.

That's the benefit of identity!

Gradually, Ye Tian's own cultivation had been promoted to the pinnacle realm of the perfect controller of the True Realm under these resources, and the Extreme Dao Will had also skyrocketed, and he had now condensed the eleventh layer of the Will Pagoda.

And on this day, Ye Tian had another big breakthrough, that is, he finally comprehended the Thunder Extreme Dao of the Extreme Realm.

The Pole of Space, the Pole of Defense, the Pole of Light, the Pole of Cause and Effect, and the Pole of Thunder.

At present, Ye Tian has raised the Five Extreme Dao to the extreme realm in total, and his strength has greatly increased.

This time, Ye Tian entered the Primordial Black Sea to test how long he could stay here, and the result was that he stayed longer than he imagined.

He could now spend trillions of years in the Primordial Black Sea, and this time he was too much longer.

Of course, even trillions of years are incomparably short compared to an eternal age, and for a cultivator like him, this time is still just a nap time, not worth mentioning.

But this is a good start, and if he comprehends a few more extreme paths, maybe he will be able to stay in the Primordial Black Sea for a few eternity years or even longer.

"The Primordial Thunder Stone has no value to me, why don't you trade it for other treasures?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he can no longer let the Lord of Canggu trade in the Extreme Dao Network, and he can't only trade the Primordial Thunder Stone from the Lord of Bear Blood on his front foot, but he doesn't refine it, but he takes it out to trade, which will definitely arouse the suspicion of the Lord of Bear Blood, even the Lord of Canggu will suspect something.

"Otherwise, take the Extreme Dao Deep Sea side to trade?"

Ye Tian suddenly had this idea.

He was now a disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace Master, and even if he held the Primordial Thunder Stone, no Extreme Path creature would dare to snatch his Primordial Thunder Stone.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Ice Palace.

On this day, Ye Tianlai consulted the Ice and Snow Palace Master.

"Master, the disciple accidentally found an Primordial Thunder Stone, but the disciple does not practice the Thunder Extreme Dao, and wants to exchange it for other Extreme Dao treasures, and I don't know where to exchange it, I hope the Master will give me a suggestion. Ye Tian asked.

"Primordial Thunderstone, you're really lucky, this is a treasure that only the Primordial Black Sea can have, and it's very unlucky to have a chance to find it. It is estimated that a certain Extreme Realm Perfect Controller entered the Primordial Black Sea to find it before, and then accidentally fell, which allowed the Primordial Thunder Stone to be revealed to the outside world, and then it was found by you by luck!"

Immediately, she thought about it and gave Ye Tian a token.

"The Extreme Mountain Order allows you to enter the Land of the Extreme Mountains, where all kinds of transactions can be conducted, and even some of the big names in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace like to enter there to trade with each other. The Extreme Dao creatures who entered there were the weakest and the top True Realm Perfect Controllers, but you are my disciple, even if you go there, no Extreme Dao creature dares to say anything. With the Primordial Thunder Stone, you should be able to trade what you need. The Ice Palace Lord said.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.
